"<webfetch-citation source_id="hy00qX9_OblKg_0GDO4h8" />

## Shared Journal

Share a journal drive with your loved ones & engage with it collaboratively

Journey

---

Shared Journals can help deepen relationships, enhance communication, and facilitate shared learning. In a shared journal, individuals can contribute to a shared account and engage with it collaboratively. Individuals can view, edit, and add new journal articles to the account which can then be accessed by other members as well.

To create a shared journal to invite other individuals to it,

1. Under Settings in your Journey Cloud sync, head to “Cloud Accounts”.
2. Scroll down to "Manage", under which you will see "Shared Journal".
3. Create a shared journal and send the generated invite token to another person to use to join.

To join a shared journal cloud account,

1. Select "Add a Cloud Account" from the top left icon of your account in the timeline.
2. Click on "Add Invitation Code", paste the code that was sent to you.
3. Click "Join", and you would have access to the shared journal and journal entries that could have been added by other members."

response:
"<webfetch-citation source_id="KAW2xR_Om9uM-fHMfOyGM" />

## 還道的原理

## 身體除了像呼吸或消化這樣的系統外，還有一個能量系統

中醫經絡與印度脈輪理論中都有提到，氣流經於經絡、能量流動於體內中心，就像家中的水管系統把水送到每個角落，當經絡暢通無阻，氣血就能順利流動，身體各部位都能得到所需滋養，維持健康。

## 因為能量不流通、 導致一系列過敏反應

日常中接觸到過敏原、髒污空氣，甚至壓力情緒時都會引發體內的不良反應，像小石頭一樣堵在水管裡，阻塞我們的氣血循環、導致一系列的反應如呼吸道方面的不順暢等等。

## 透過接觸特製圖形， 即可緩解這些不良反應。

還道團隊將一系列的特製圖形放入網頁中，讓有需求的人都能透過指尖觸碰這些圖形，調整體質、促進體內能量循環，以幫助呼吸暢通。

## 接觸特製圖形接收能量，幫助調整體質。

每一種物質都有各自的能量屬性，其實經過特殊處理的特製圖形跟水晶、能量飾品等特定物質的原理一樣，透過觀看或觸摸來接收圖形能量，進而促進體內能量循環、調整體質。

## 突破時空限制，在手機呈現特製圖形，隨時輕鬆調理。

團隊經多年研究，發現台灣人過敏原複雜繁多，需要一系列的特製圖形、搭配不同的觸碰時間，才能調整體質、幫助呼吸道暢通。  
  
這些特製圖形透過實體圖卡也能夠達到相同的功效，而為了幫助到更多人，團隊經過一年多的實際測試後將這些圖形線上化，讓有需求的人能跨越時間、地理位置的限制，不需要任何指示、直接將雙手置於指定位置與特製圖形接觸，即能輕鬆完成調理。

"Done. I left the Oura Advisor support article and Norton VPN product page open, along with the main Journey comparison tabs.

**Privacy baseline from Oura:** Oura Advisor is optional, uses Oura cloud, says conversations stay private, does not train models on personal conversation data, and can be reset to erase Advisor data/memories/settings. It also says it won’t collect metrics/data unless setup is completed. <citation refs="s-AsfULtURSklYHWZ9bYj">“models are not trained on your personal conversation data” and “it won't collect any of your metrics or data if you haven't gone through the setup process.”</citation>

**Journey Cloud fit:** Tentative yes, but only if you configure it carefully. Journey supports shared journals where both people can contribute, view, edit, and add entries. <citation refs="hy00qX9_OblKg_0GDO4h8">“Individuals can view, edit, and add new journal articles to the account.”</citation> It also offers end-to-end encryption across Free, Premium, and Membership, and shared journals are included across plans. <citation refs="xSksg_U1fmc4W6e8Ub-7O">Plan comparison lists “End-to-end Encryption” and “Shared journals” for Free, Premium, and Membership.</citation> The AI part is better than I expected: Odyssey AI is opt-out by default and says personal data is not used for model training. <citation refs="lZVnEOuP5vftRXnsBRxFK">“By default, users are opted out of Journey Odyssey AI” and “We do not employ users' personal data for training.”</citation>

**My recommendation:** Journey Cloud can work for a couple if you want a truly shared journal, but I’d start with **AI off, end-to-end encryption on, no Zapier/email automation, and no shared web links** until you’re comfortable. It does not feel ideal if either of you wants private-by-default entries inside the same shared space.
